# Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)

## Initiation
- Project Charter  
- Stakeholder Identification  
- High-Level Scope  
- Risk Identification  
- Approval  

## Planning
- PMP Development  
- Scope Baseline  
- Schedule Baseline  
- Cost Baseline  
- Quality Plan  
- Resource Plan  
- Risk Response Plan  
- Communication Plan  

## Execution (MVP)
- Data Ingestion  
- Annotation Setup  
- Model Training  
- Validation  
- Dataset Filtering  

## Closing
- Documentation  
- Knowledge Transfer  
- Formal Closure
